entities.name: AI dependency loops are efficient short-term but harmful long-term
entities.context: User asks → AI answers → User consumes → User returns

entities.name: Answering is faster but scaffolding is better

entities.name: AI that scaffolds well will be used less - anti-engagement but pro-flourishing

relationships.context: Module is part of the relationship-monitor skill
Vygotsky originated the concept of instructional scaffolding
Bruner developed the concept alongside Vygotsky
ZPD is Vygotsky's concept - working just beyond what learner can do alone
Scaffolding ENABLES healthy exploration patterns detected by exploration-return detector
D-STEER paper analyzes how DPO alignment training works
ESR circuits may help detect inconsistency with who one is supposed to be
